name: ansi-color-escape
comment: GitHub Actions emits coloured logs (ANSI CSI sequences) when stdout is a TTY-equivalent. Local runs without color/no-tty produce the same text without escape codes. The textual payload after stripping ESC[ codes is identical. JSON cannot embed the literal ESC byte verbatim so we use the \u001b escape; encoding/json decodes that to the real 0x1B byte at load time.
